finding_results.notes: Standardized all Chapter 4 bounty references to the canonical four-thousand-gold-crown figure and tightened nearby phrasing so the amount reads as immediate pursuit pressure.
Reconciled narration, internal threat readout, and dialogue to the continuity-sheet bounty amount within the chapter scope.
Removed the repeated narrator explanation of Derry's fear-chatter and replaced it with concrete chatter plus strap-fidgeting so the tell is shown instead of diagnosed.
Normalized descriptive and expository punctuation across the chapter. Post-revision validation found 0 prose lines containing em-dashes, down from 62.
Every surviving bounty mention in Chapter 4 now uses the canonical four-thousand-gold-crown amount.
Restored Aldric's canonical title to Knight-paladin of the Order of the Veil's Fourth Seal.
Expanded the failed-consumption aftermath and the emergency bank-building with causally necessary material. Post-revision word count is 5062 while preserving the Chapter 5 handoff.

summary: Fixed all packet findings in Chapter 4: bounty continuity is now consistent at four thousand gold crowns, Aldric's title is canonical, Derry's fear-talk is shown rather than re-explained, em-dash overuse was removed, and the hollow aftermath was expanded past 5000 words without changing the next chapter's starting state.
